description: This file defines a Tooltip class for Bootstrap, implementing tooltip functionality using Popper.js for positioning. It includes constants, class methods, event handling, and integration with jQuery. The file is a core component for tooltip UI elements in Bootstrap.

classes.name: Tooltip
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent that manages tooltip UI elements, including showing, hiding, toggling, and positioning tooltips with support for various triggers and configurations.

methods.name: enable
methods.description: Enables the tooltip functionality.

methods.name: disable
methods.description: Disables the tooltip functionality.

methods.name: toggleEnabled
methods.description: Toggles the enabled state of the tooltip.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the tooltip visibility based on current state.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up event listeners and destroys the tooltip instance.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the tooltip if conditions are met.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the tooltip if it is currently shown.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates the position of the tooltip.

methods.name: _isWithContent
methods.description: Checks if the tooltip has content to display.

methods.name: _getTipElement
methods.description: Retrieves or creates the tooltip element.

methods.name: _createTipElement
methods.description: Creates the tooltip DOM element with content.

methods.name: setContent
methods.description: Sets new content for the tooltip and redisplays if visible.

methods.name: _getTemplateFactory
methods.description: Returns or creates a TemplateFactory for tooltip content.

methods.name: _getContentForTemplate
methods.description: Prepares content for the tooltip template.

methods.name: _getTitle
methods.description: Retrieves the tooltip title from config or attribute.

methods.name: _initializeOnDelegatedTarget
methods.description: Initializes tooltip instance on delegated target.

methods.name: _isAnimated
methods.description: Determines if the tooltip should animate.

methods.name: _isShown
methods.description: Checks if the tooltip is currently visible.

methods.name: _createPopper
methods.description: Creates a Popper instance for positioning.

methods.name: _getOffset
methods.description: Calculates offset for tooltip placement.

methods.name: _resolvePossibleFunction
methods.description: Executes if argument is a function, otherwise returns value.

methods.name: _getPopperConfig
methods.description: Builds configuration object for Popper.

methods.name: _setListeners
methods.description: Attaches event listeners based on trigger configuration.

methods.name: _fixTitle
methods.description: Fixes the title attribute for accessibility.

methods.name: _enter
methods.description: Handles mouseenter or focusin to show tooltip.

methods.name: _leave
methods.description: Handles mouseleave or focusout to hide tooltip.

methods.name: _setTimeout
methods.description: Sets a timeout for delayed show/hide.

methods.name: _isWithActiveTrigger
methods.description: Checks if any trigger is active.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Merges data attributes and options into config.

methods.name: _configAfterMerge
methods.description: Post-processes merged config.

methods.name: _getDelegateConfig
methods.description: Prepares configuration for delegated triggers.

methods.name: _disposePopper
methods.description: Destroys Popper instance and removes tooltip element.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin interface for Tooltip.
